description: Promote the Maven artifacts for 'commons-lang3' version 3.14.0 by copying them from the 'staging-libs-local' repository to the 'release-libs-local' repository. The artifacts ('commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' and 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.pom') are located at 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/' and must be placed at the identical path in the destination repository. Ensure the original files are preserved in the staging repository.
